visualGoal: Teach a direct-drive owner to kill clipping and tune per-sim confidently. Visual/structural richness comes primarily from settings TABLES, tip/forum callouts and per-sim guidance — NOT a forced product roundup. Product photos appear ONLY for the verified wheelbases the settings genuinely target (MOZA Pit House, Simucube), used as gearpick asides.

heroImage.note: No dedicated FFB scene photo exists as a verified asset. Hero uses the verified MOZA R12 (Pit House) base — a primary target of the iRacing/LMU settings in the guide, so on-topic rather than decorative. The old frontmatter pointed at /images/racing/best-ffb-settings-iracing-acc-lmu-2026.jpg which is NOT in verified-product-images.json and was removed.

realProductPhotosNeeded.notes: This image IS verified (.webp). realProductPhotosNeeded.product: Simagic Alpha Evo Pro (referenced as an 18Nm example)
realProductPhotosNeeded.notes: Verified image exists. Left text-only to avoid forcing product density on a settings how-to. Available for a future shotgrid of target bases.

editorialCompositePrompts.prompt: Realistic sim-racing cockpit at amber rim light, hands on a carbon GT wheel, a large on-screen force-feedback meter visible in the corner with the bar hovering just below the red clip zone (dynamic, not maxed), real direct-drive wheelbase product overlay at the mount, no fake logos, no fake UI text, 16:9 editorial cover.
editorialCompositePrompts.negativePrompt: fake logos, warped controls, unreadable tiny text, procedural gradient art, impossible ergonomics
editorialCompositePrompts.notes: Optional editorial upgrade for the hero. Non-blocking — guide is carried by tables + gearpicks. Until generated, hero stays on the verified moza-r12.jpg.

infographicPrompts.title: What clipping looks like on the meter
content: Clean signal: peaks breathe below the red
Clipping: peaks flatten to one dead wall
Fix: lower gain 5% until only real impacts hit red
infographicPrompts.style: IgnitionSim command-center chart, large readable text, red clip zone highlighted

infographicPrompts.title: Set the ceiling to your real Nm
content: LMU: Steering Torque Capability = base Nm
ACC: no ceiling — tune Gain to clip line
infographicPrompts.style: Three-column per-sim card layout, product-photo placeholders for Codex overlays

curatorScenePrompts.prompt: Realistic adult Gen X sim-racing curator Duke Alvarez pointing at a force-feedback meter on screen, confident mechanic energy, clean garage cockpit bay, practical not fantasy, 4:5 portrait.

screenshotsOrGameMediaNeeded.item: iRacing FFB force meter screenshot (clean vs clipping)
screenshotsOrGameMediaNeeded.notes: Would strengthen the clipping explainer. Must be a properly licensed/owned capture, not scraped. Non-blocking.

openQuestions: Do we want an optional 4-tile shotgrid of the verified target bases (moza-r12, fanatec-clubsport-dd-plus, simagic-evo-pro, simucube-2-sport) at the top, or keep density deliberately low as a settings how-to?
Confirm iRacing native 360Hz MOZA build number for a precise citation (guide currently says 'recent builds').
